nodes.summary: EPIC-030 planned high-priority enhancement to incorporate previous season performance as a factor in preseason ELO ratings.

nodes.summary: EPIC-033 planned high-priority data pipeline for the 2026 CFB season covering automated game imports and weekly update processes.

nodes.summary: Brownfield enhancement epic fixing season year detection logic to correctly identify the active CFB season during January and early February playoffs.
